description:
The Image component takes in a SpriteProvider or Material and renders it onto the UIX. This can be used to display graphics and produce backgrounds.

}}

fields.Material: The material to render with. is not required.
fields.PreserveAspect: Preserves the aspect ratio of this image provided.
fields.NineSliceSizing: Tells how the image gets 9-sliced on this UIX.
fields.InteractionTarget: Makes this image as the interaction target for this UIX.
fields.FillRect: The filling rect for this image.
fields.__legacyZWrite: Internal - The legacy Z writing for this image.
fields.Tint: A color that is multiplied with the material's color.

usage: A user can use this to just display an image with an optional tint color, or have this as a background image for other images to be on top of.
